summary: Vertical video. A DHS motion-graphics spot with a Trump voiceover ('Leave now. If you don't, we will find you, and we will deport you') and animated 'LEAVE NOW' typography over a textured navy wall, followed by a sequence of grayscale criminal mugshots on red backgrounds, each captioned with charges (lewd acts with a minor, narcotics and assault, child pornography) and stamped with the DHS seal. It carries no music track and uses the spoken voiceover. On-screen text reads 'LEAVE NOW', 'LEWD AND LASCIVIOUS ACTS WITH A MINOR', 'NARCOTICS AND ASSAULT', '100 COUNTS OF POSSESSION OF CHILD PORNOGRAPHY', and 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY'.
notable_text: LEAVE NOW; LEWD AND LASCIVIOUS ACTS WITH A MINOR; NARCOTICS AND ASSAULT; 100 COUNTS OF POSSESSION OF CHILD PORNOGRAPHY; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY; VO: 'Leave now. If you don't, we will find you, and we will deport you. You will never return.'
